prompt: Our project has 45% line coverage but mostly happy-path tests. Help me audit coverage and identify critical gaps. Node.js REST API with Express, Prisma, PostgreSQL.

assertions.text: Distinguishes between line coverage and branch coverage
Identifies error handling paths as likely coverage gaps
Suggests specific tools or commands for coverage analysis
Prioritizes gaps by risk (financial, security, data integrity)
Provides concrete test examples for identified gaps
